---
title: "Germline-Somatic Interaction from Anonymized Data - Figure 4"
authors:
  - Anton Safonov
  - Luca Boscolo Bielo
  - David Brown
output: html_document
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
---

```{r load_packages_functions, include=FALSE}
library("gdata")
library("ggplot2")
library("readr")
library("data.table")
library("dplyr")
library("reshape2")
library("magrittr")
library("viridis")
library("superheat")
library("ggsignif")
library("ggrepel")
library("ggforce")
library("gridExtra")
library("pander")
library("tidyr")
library("foreach")
library("parallel")
library("doMC")
library("fuzzyjoin")
library("maftools")
library("ggnomics")
library("Gviz")
library("GenomicRanges")
library("BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg19")
library("ComplexHeatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library("copynumber")

setup_ideograms(genome = "hg19")
registerDoMC(8)

START = 21230103
END = 84220257

'scientific_10' <- function(x) {
	parse(text=gsub("+", "", gsub("e", " %.% 10^", scales::scientific_format()(x)), , fixed = TRUE))
}

'scale_range' <- function(x, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE) {
	x = as.vector(scale(x, center = center, scale = scale))
	return(invisible(x))
}

'str_split' <- function(x, split, fixed, n) {
	y = unlist(strsplit(x, split = split, fixed = fixed))[n]
	return(invisible(y))
}
```

```{r include=FALSE, echo = FALSE}
smoothed_log2 = readr::read_csv(file = "../data/Supp_Fig4a_Log2_Ratio.csv.gz", col_names = TRUE, col_types = cols(.default = col_character())) %>%
		readr::type_convert() %>%
		data.frame() %>%
		copynumber::winsorize(method = "mad", , tau = 1.5, k = 25, verbose = FALSE) %>%
		dplyr::rename_all(function(x) {c("Chromosome", "Position", "Log2_Ratio")}) 
	
segmented_log2 = smoothed_log2 %>%
		 dplyr::filter(Position >= START & Position <= END) %>%
		 copynumber::pcf(gamma = 5, normalize = FALSE, fast = TRUE, verbose = FALSE) %>%
	 	 dplyr::select(-arm, -n.probes) %>%
		 dplyr::rename(Chromosome = chrom, Start_Position = start.pos, End_Position = end.pos) %>%
		 dplyr::mutate(Chromosome = case_when(
			 		Chromosome == 23 ~ "X",
			 		TRUE ~ as.character(Chromosome)
		 )) %>%
		 dplyr::mutate(Chromosome = factor(Chromosome, levels = c(1:22, "X"), ordered = TRUE)) %>%
		 dplyr::rename(sample_name = sampleID, Log2_Ratio = mean) %>%
		 dplyr::mutate(absolute_copies = round(((2^Log2_Ratio)*((1*2)+(2-2*1)) - 2 + 2*1)/1)) %>%
		 dplyr::mutate(rounded_copies = signif(((2^Log2_Ratio)*((1*2)+(2-2*1)) - 2 + 2*1)/1, 1))
	
segmented_log2 = segmented_log2 %>%
		 dplyr::select(-Log2_Ratio) %>%
		 dplyr::left_join(segmented_log2 %>%
				  dplyr::group_by(absolute_copies) %>%
				  dplyr::summarize(Log2_Ratio = mean(Log2_Ratio)),
				  by = "absolute_copies") %>%
		 dplyr::mutate(Log2_Ratio = case_when(
			 	Log2_Ratio < (-.5) & Log2_Ratio > (-1) ~ -1,
			 	TRUE ~ Log2_Ratio
		 ))
```

```{r echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.align = 'left', fig.height = 5, fig.width = 5, fig.cap = '**Figure 4e**'}
plot_ = smoothed_log2 %>%
	dplyr::filter(Position >= START & Position <= END) %>%
	ggplot(aes(x = Position, y = Log2_Ratio)) +
	geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "goldenrod3", linetype = 3, size = 1) +
	geom_point(stat = "identity", shape = 21, size = 1, color = "#252525", fill = "#252525", alpha = 1) +
	geom_segment(data = segmented_log2 %>%
		     	    dplyr::arrange(desc(sample_name)) %>%
		     	    dplyr::mutate(sample_name = factor(sample_name, levels = unique(sample_name), ordered = TRUE)),
		     mapping = aes(x = Start_Position, y = Log2_Ratio, xend = End_Position, yend = Log2_Ratio),
		     		   color = "salmon", inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 1.5, lineend = "round") +
	geom_point(data = dplyr::tibble(x = mean(c(32889645, 32974405)), y = -3.5),
		   mapping = aes(x = x , y = y),
		   shape = 25, color = "#377eb8", fill = "#377eb8", size = 2.5) +
	geom_point(data = dplyr::tibble(x = mean(c(48877887, 49056026)), y = -3.5),
		   mapping = aes(x = x , y = y),
		   shape = 25, color = "#4daf4a", fill = "#4daf4a", size = 2.5) +
	geom_text(data = dplyr::tibble(x = mean(c(32889645, 32974405)), y = -3.25, label = "BRCA2"),
		  mapping = aes(x = x , y = y, label = label),
		  color = "#377eb8", size = 2.5, fontface = "italic") +
	geom_text(data = dplyr::tibble(x = mean(c(48877887, 49056026)), y = -3.25, label = "RB1"),
		  mapping = aes(x = x , y = y, label = label),
		  color = "#4daf4a", size = 2.5, fontface = "italic") +
	xlab("\n\nCoordinate\n") +
	ylab(expression(Log[2]~"Ratio")) +
	scale_x_continuous(labels = scientific_10) +
	scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
			   limits = c(-3.5, 2)) +
	theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
	      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12),
	      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(r = 20))) +
	theme_minimal() +
	guides(x = guide_ideogram_axis(title = "\nChromosome 13 (bp)\n\n", position = "bottom", chromosome = "chr13",
				       genome = "hg19", ideo_size = unit(.5, "cm"), funnel_size = unit(.1, "cm"),
				       funnel_col = "grey90"),
	       color = FALSE, shape = FALSE, size = FALSE, fill = FALSE, alpha = FALSE)
	
suppressWarnings(grid.arrange(plot_))
```
